info.title: Comfy Capybara — Secure Contract
info.description:
Secure-by-contract OpenAPI specification for the Comfy Capybara API. Strict schemas, additionalProperties: false, and explicit field allowlists are designed so that an API security gateway enforcing this spec would block BOLA, BFLA, mass assignment, excessive data exposure, SSRF, and shadow API access.

Game debug endpoints are intentionally excluded from this public contract.

tags.name: game
tags.description: Game mode control, scoring, and leaderboard

tags.name: shadow-providers
tags.description: Shadow v1 provider endpoints (undocumented legacy surface)

tags.name: jwks
tags.description: JSON Web Key Set for JWT verification

post.x-security-requirements: Secure contract: role field is NOT accepted. Server assigns role=user.

post.summary: Login as game admin (sets HttpOnly cookie)

get.summary: Get a single capybara by ID

200.x-security-requirements: Secure contract: response MUST NOT include provider_password or union_notes.

post.x-security-requirements: Secure contract: user_id is set server-side from JWT. Client MUST NOT supply user_id, status, union_override, or price_quoted.

200.description: List of bookings belonging to the authenticated user

get.x-security-requirements: Secure contract: user_id query parameter is NOT accepted. Server always filters by authenticated user's ID.

200.description: Booking details (only if owned by authenticated user)

get.x-security-requirements: Secure contract: server MUST verify booking.user_id matches authenticated user (BOLA prevention).

200.description: Booking updated (only if owned by authenticated user)

patch.x-security-requirements: Secure contract: only start, duration_mins, and notes are modifiable. status, union_override, price_quoted, user_id MUST be rejected. Server MUST verify ownership.

delete.x-security-requirements: Secure contract: server MUST verify booking.user_id matches authenticated user (BOLA prevention).

get.x-security-requirements: Secure contract: fields query parameter is NOT accepted. Response MUST NOT include password, salary, or any sensitive internal field.

example.message: My capybara was late to the session.

post.x-security-requirements: Secure contract: attachmentUrl field is NOT accepted. Server-side URL fetching is disabled to prevent SSRF.
Secure contract: union_rank is NOT accepted from client. Server assigns Apprentice. hourly_rate is server-computed from rank.

200.x-security-requirements: Secure contract: response MUST NOT include provider_password or union_notes.

patch.x-security-requirements: Secure contract: id field MUST NOT be accepted (BOLA prevention). Only temperament and current_mood are modifiable. Server MUST use capybara_id from JWT claims.

get.summary: Get boot ID and game state for polling

post.summary: Join an active game round as a player

400.description: No active round, invalid PIN, or name taken

post.summary: Register as a player (alias for join)

400.description: No active round, invalid PIN, or name taken

parameters.name: X-Comfy-Player
parameters.description: Player session token (alternative to comfy_session cookie)

post.summary: Manually mark an exploit as scored

parameters.name: exploit_id
parameters.description: Exploit identifier from the exploit registry

post.summary: Finish current turn and submit score

200.description: Paginated list of capybaras with union data

get.summary: Get a single capybara with union details

patch.summary: Update union data for a capybara

delete.x-security-requirements: Secure contract: MUST require admin role (BFLA prevention). Any non-admin user MUST receive 403.

delete.summary: Delete all union rep accounts (admin only)

post.summary: Reset and re-seed demo data (admin only)

get.summary: RSA public key in JWKS format
get.description: Returns the JSON Web Key Set containing the RSA public key used to verify JWT signatures issued by this API.

get.summary: List legacy HR records (shadow API proxy)
get.description: Proxies to shadow-api. Returns PII fields (addresses, bank data, SSNs). Secure contract: requires JWT authentication with union_rep or admin role. No legacy key bypass.

200.description: List of legacy HR records with PII

401.description: Authentication required or legacy key invalid

get.summary: Get a single legacy HR record
get.description: Proxies to shadow-api. Returns PII for a single capybara. Requires authentication but no role check (BOLA vulnerability in implementation).

patch.description: Proxies to shadow-api. Updates fields on the legacy HR record. Secure contract restricts to notes only; implementation accepts all fields (mass assignment vulnerability).

get.description: Returns a single capybara provider record. Secure contract: provider can only access their own record (object_id must equal token.capybara_id).

403.description: Provider access required or accessing another provider's record

x-object-level-authorization.description: Provider can only access their own record

patch.description: Updates a capybara provider. Secure contract: provider can only update their own record, and only temperament and current_mood fields are accepted.

403.description: Provider access required or modifying another provider's record

x-object-level-authorization.description: Provider can only modify their own record

BearerAuth.description: JWT (RS256) token obtained from /auth/login or /providers/login. Verify via /.well-known/jwks.json. Include as: Authorization: Bearer <token>. Standard claims: iss=comfy-capybara, aud=comfy-api, sub=<user_id|capy_id>.

x-jwt-claims.sub: string (user ID, game admin ID, or capybara ID)

ObjectId.name: object_id
ObjectId.description: Capybara provider ID. Secure contract: MUST match the authenticated provider's own capybara_id.

AuthRegisterRequest.description: Secure contract: role field is explicitly excluded. Server always assigns role=user.

CapybaraPublic.description: Public capybara view. Excludes provider_password and union_notes.

BookingCreateRequest.description: Secure contract: user_id, status, union_override, price_quoted MUST NOT be accepted.

BookingUpdateRequest.description: Secure contract: only start, duration_mins, and notes are modifiable. status, union_override, price_quoted, user_id MUST be rejected.

BookingResponse.description: Booking record. union_override is excluded from response.

MeResponse.description: Secure contract: only id, email, role. No password, salary, or internal fields.

SupportTicketCreateRequest.description: Secure contract: attachmentUrl is explicitly excluded to prevent SSRF.

SupportTicketCreateResponse.description: Secure contract: attachmentFetch field excluded. No server-side URL fetch results exposed.

ProviderRegisterRequest.description: Secure contract: union_rank is NOT accepted. Server assigns Apprentice. hourly_rate is server-computed.

ProviderRegisterResponse.description: Newly registered provider. Always starts as Apprentice at rate 20.

ProviderUpdateRequest.description: Secure contract: only temperament and current_mood. id, name, union_rank, hourly_rate, provider_password, union_notes MUST be rejected.

pin.description: Round PIN (returned only in game mode)

UnionCapybaraRecord.description: Union view of capybara. Includes union_notes for authorized roles. Excludes provider_password.

LegacyHRRecord.description: Legacy HR record from shadow-api. Contains PII fields (addresses, bank data, SSNs).

LegacyHRUpdateRequest.description: Secure contract: only union_notes is permitted. payroll_notes and all PII fields (home_address, bank_name, bank_account_last4, pay_routing_token, capybara_social_id) must be rejected.
